project.title: Canon in D - Concert Hall Pianist
project.goal: Create a 30-60 second cinematic AI video of a pianist performing Canon in D in an elegant concert hall.

alternate_format.note: Use wider crops for YouTube or horizontal presentation.

music.arrangement_note: Use a separately sourced or generated piano recording, then edit shots to musical beats. Video prompts should imply performance rather than demand exact fingering.
music.rhythm_structure: Gentle arpeggiated piano intro, flowing Canon progression, gradual emotional swell, soft final cadence.

reference_style.derived_style: Vertical short-video portrait aesthetic, soft beauty lighting, intimate close-ups, gentle handheld or dolly feeling, warm stage tones, refined human subject focus.
reference_style.character_reference: Use the reference videos only as a soft visual direction: young adult East Asian female pianist, neat long dark hair with soft bangs, delicate natural features, calm focused expression. Do not require an exact face clone unless the generation platform supports and permits a user-provided character reference.
reference_style.concert_upgrade: Upgrade the casual portrait feeling into a luxury classical concert hall with warm golden lighting, deep red curtains, polished wooden floor, white floral foreground accents, and a glossy black grand piano.

global_character_lock: same young adult East Asian female professional concert pianist throughout the film, elegant black concert dress, neat long dark hair with soft bangs, calm focused expression, refined posture, natural face, consistent hairstyle, consistent outfit, no visible jewelry
global_positive_requirements: 4K, shallow depth of field, smooth camera movement
global_negative_prompt: extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, malformed hands, distorted hands, broken wrists, unnatural finger bending, incorrect piano keys, warped keyboard, melting keys, duplicated keyboard, hands not touching keys, fingers floating above keys, random hand motion, impossible piano technique, blurry hands, deformed face, asymmetrical face, changing face, changing hairstyle, changing outfit, extra arms, extra hands, duplicate person, multiple pianists, bad anatomy, unnatural posture, flickering identity, inconsistent clothing, low quality, cartoon, anime, CGI-looking, plastic skin, overexposed face, underexposed hands, shaky camera, fast chaotic movement, motion artifacts, text, subtitles, watermark, logo, distorted concert hall, floating piano, broken piano legs, impossible reflections

generation_notes.runway: Generate each shot separately at 5-8 seconds. Use the same character reference image if available. Keep motion set to slow or medium-low.
generation_notes.pika: Use image-to-video for hand close-ups if possible. Keep prompts concise and repeat the character lock.
generation_notes.kling: Use high-quality mode, fixed seed if available, and reference image consistency for the pianist.
generation_notes.sora: Use each shot prompt as an individual clip prompt. Add the previous shot as visual reference when supported.

shots.title: Golden Hall Opening
shots.visual_description: A luxury concert hall appears in warm golden light. A glossy black grand piano sits center stage. The pianist is already seated, seen as a graceful silhouette, preparing for the first notes.
shots.camera_movement: slow dolly-in from the aisle toward the stage, stable and elegant
shots.lighting: warm golden spotlight, soft red curtain glow, gentle bloom on the piano lid
shots.music_rhythm_point: 0:00 - first soft D major arpeggio, the hall breathes before the melody begins
shots.subtitle: The hall falls silent.
shots.prompt: Wide establishing vertical shot of the same young adult East Asian female professional concert pianist in an elegant black concert dress, professional concert pianist seated at a glossy black grand piano, performing Canon in D inside an elegant concert hall, cinematic lighting, realistic hands playing piano keys visible in the distance, emotional, graceful, refined atmosphere, warm golden spotlight, deep red curtains, polished wooden floor, white floral foreground accents, luxury classical music performance, 4K, shallow depth of field, smooth camera movement, slow dolly-in, high-end cinematic realism, natural film grain.

shots.music_rhythm_point: 0:11 - melody becomes recognizable; gentle right-hand movement over stable left hand
